name: MP9 | 威吓者
descriptionEn: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a production line yellow color scheme. This bone crusher is a devastator
descriptionZh: 由瑞士制造，尖端的 MP9 微型冲锋枪是一把符合人类工效学的聚合物武器，深受私人保安公司青睐。 这把武器的部分零件以黄色生产线的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 这把碎骨器是个毁灭者
